zh.lifeSummary: 當Efa ferch Cynwrig於大約1285年出生在英國威爾斯福林爾哈爾金時，她的父親Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan-5歲，母親Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig-3歲。她於大約1332年與Maredudd Y Goch ap Ieuan在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾霍普結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Efa ferch Cynwrig于大约1285年出生在英国威尔斯福林爾哈爾金时，她的父亲Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan-5岁，母亲Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig-3岁。她于大约1332年与Maredudd Y Goch ap Ieuan在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾霍普结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Efa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of several Anglicized forms of the Gaelic name Eithne . In the case of Queen Victoria's granddaughter Princess Ena (Victoria Eugénie Julia Ena,  1887–1969 ) it had a different origin: it was a misreading by the minister who baptized her off a handwritten note of the originally intended name   Eva .  In England, the name is remembered principally as that of the fearsome  Ena Sharples  in the television soap opera Coronation Street.  See also  Ina .

variants.name: Eithne
meanings: Traditional name, apparently from eithne ‘kernel’, which was used as a term of praise in bardic poetry. St Eithne was a daughter of King Laoghaire and one of St Patrick's first converts.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Efa ferch Cynwrig was born about 1285, in Halkyn, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan, was -5 and her mother, Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig, was -3. She married Maredudd Y Goch ap Ieuan about 1332, in Hope, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Efa ferch Cynwrig est née environ 1285, à Halkyn, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan, avait -5 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig, avait -3 ans. Elle a épousé Maredudd Y Goch ap Ieuan environ 1332, à Hope, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Efa ferch Cynwrig um 1285 in Halkyn, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan -5 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig -3. Sie hat um 1332 in Hope, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom Maredudd Y Goch ap Ieuan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

ja.lifeSummary: Efa ferch Cynwrigが約1285年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアハルクインで生まれた時，父Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychanは-5歳，母Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrigは-3歳であった。約1332年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアホーペでMaredudd Y Goch ap Ieuanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Efa ferch Cynwrig(이)가 대략 1285년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르 할키에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan(은)는 -5세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig(은)는 -3세였다. 그녀는 대략 1332년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 홉에서 Maredudd Y Goch ap Ieuan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Efa ferch Cynwrig nasceu aproximadamente 1285, em Halkyn, Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan, tinha -5 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig, tinha -3 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Efa ferch Cynwrig родилась около 1285 г. в местности хэлкин, флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan было -5 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig, -3. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Maredudd Y Goch ap Ieuan около 1332 г. в местности хоп, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Efa ferch Cynwrig nació aproximadamente 1285, en Halkyn, Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan, tenía -5 años y su mamá, Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig, tenía -3 años. Se casó con Maredudd Y Goch ap Ieuan aproximadamente 1332, en Hope, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas.
